english_translation: This is a very long text that should be truncated when the input token length is set to a smaller value. This text contains multiple sentences and is designed to test the truncation functionality of the model performance testing tool. The text should be longer than the maximum token length we will set in our test.

Another long text for testing purposes. This text is also designed to be longer than the maximum token length to test the truncation functionality. It includes multiple sentences and should be properly truncated when the token limit is reached.
